Damage Assessment
1. Confirmation
Date and time when the item was physically collected.
2. Condition Assessment
No Defect
Item is in good condition. Full security deposit will be refunded.
Minor Damage 5% Deduction
Small scratches, cosmetic wear, or minor stains that don't affect function.
Moderate Damage 15% Deduction
Visible dents, broken non-essential parts, or significant wear.
Major Damage 30% Deduction
Broken essential parts, heavy structural damage, or malfunction.
3. Remarks
4. Evidence
